entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

Hi All,

I am Prashanth Gaddam from Hyderabad, India.

entry.title: Re: How to get ready for Change & Deployment Management in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Great blog! As a newbie to CALM, I have a few CTS questions.
1) Can CALM promote transports originating in a BW 7.5 on Hana scenario where the system is 'on-prem' and the transport is in the ABAP stack, as well as Hana transports? 
2) Does a transport have to be initiated in a project that is started in CALM?
3) Are any 3rd party CTS tools required, or is CTS functionality built into CALM such that it can completely replace ChaRM?

 

Many Thanks,

Kurt

entry.title: Re: Delete Homepage Career Site Builder
entry.content:
Hi Lisa,

The delete option is not available for a brand-specific homepage. Instead, you can publish the same content there as you have on the global homepage.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Advanced Inter company sales and Advanced Customer returns
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone advice what is the total number of days and resources required required to design, configure and unit test , quality test the following two items . If someone pls can give answer based on certain assumptions that will be also fine.

1) Advanced inter company sales

2) Advanced customer returns.

rgds

sar

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM API returns forbidden / 403 (in postman)
entry.content:
Hi  friscas,

If your authentication response JSON is missing Scope data, it usually means one of two things:

  • The Scopes have not been added to the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Instance.
  • The Scopes have been added to the Service Key/Binding (the "child") instead of the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Instance (the "parent"). 

I suspect that you have taken the latter path, and updated the child Service Key/Binding instead of the parent SAP Cloud ALM API Instance. You mentioned that you added the correct scopes already as per the Managing Scopes guide. That guide also states that the scopes must be added to the Service Instance.

Please try updating the SAP Cloud ALM API Service Instance (and not the child Service Key/Binding) in the SAP Cloud ALM API with the correct scopes. Once you have done that, re-test if the authentication response JSON contains the expected Scope values. If they are contained in the JSON, then you can try continuing with the API tests via Postman.

Thanks and regards, 
John

entry.title: Re: How to Write a blog
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Questionmark cannot launch sample exam / I s this the...

entry.title: Request to host CAP AI Code Jam Newtown Square PA

Hi,

We are looking to host a Code Jam the day following a BTP Customer Success Day in NsQ to allow attendees to extend their experience to Friday.

Location: SAP, Newtown Square, PA

Topic: Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP Gen AI Hub

Date: Friday April 25th 2025

Thanks
JohnA

entry.title: Re: Advanced Inter company sales and Advanced Customer re...
entry.content:
Hi 

The total number of days and resources required for Advanced Intercompany Sales and Advanced Customer Returns in SAP depends on various factors like complexity, system landscape, integrations, and business requirements.

Advanced Intercompany Sales (AICS)

Estimated Duration: 30–40 Days

  • Design & Blueprinting: 5–7 Days

  • Configuration & Unit Testing: 12–15 Days

  • Quality Testing (SIT, UAT): 8–10 Days

  • Fixing & Refinement: 5–7 Days

Resources Required:

  • 1 SAP SD Consultant

  • 1 SAP MM Consultant (if procurement is involved)

  • 1 SAP FI Consultant (for intercompany billing)

  • 1 Tester (for UAT)

Assumptions:

  • Standard intercompany setup with automated billing and logistics

  • Minimal custom development

  • Integration with Finance and MM

entry.title: /BI0/ASM_UPLDD00 table high records
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we need your help on /BI0/ASM_UPLDD00 table reached 1.90 Billion records. How do we reduce the size of this table?

We found Usage Logging and SQLM application in deactivation status for housekeeping , can you please suggest on housekeeping settings?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: /BI0/ASM_UPLDD00 table high records
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The reason for the table  /BI0/ASM_UPLDD00 containing a large number of entries is usually the fact that the Usage Logging Housekeeping Settings are inactive. Additionally insufficient retention periods can cause excess data growth in this table. 

The table /BI0/ASM_UPLDD00 is an application table which represents the contents of the DataStore Object 0SM_UPLDD - this is where daily data, collected as part of usage logging, is stored. Daily data is then aggregated into further DSOs at different granularities (weekly, monthly and yearly) to support usage logging activities. 

It is highly recommended to activate housekeeping for Usage Logging, and to configure retention periods, to enable the BW housekeeping job (E2E BI HOUSEKEEPING job) to delete excess data for each system daily. This prevents a build-up of unneeded data in the DSO.

The default retention period for daily data is 14 days, meaning that the housekeeping job will search for and delete any data older than 14 days from the DSO. Any value can be chosen for the retention period, based on your usage logging requirements. 

To activate the Housekeeping Settings for Usage Logging, follow the steps below:

  1. In Solution Manager system, execute Transaction: SOLMAN_SETUP.
  2. Select the Custom Code Management Scenario.
  3. Enter Step 3.
  4. Select the Managed System that you wish to maintain Housekeeping for from the list.
  5. Enter Edit mode.
  6. Select the Settings dropdown in the System Overview section, and select System-Specific Settings
  7. The resulting pop-up window displays the current settings - retention periods and activation status of housekeeping
  8. Maintain the desired retention periods and activation settings
  9. Click Save

For more information on the Usage Logging please refer to the SAP Help Portal:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/283e4c6df1d44887a6449094bbfc3775/7f6a89e0ae0b48dba16f0d1252d88797.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/dfb02462c453431eaf249aad96f004f8/7bf1c60384fb43788e7feba50036b94b.html?version=7.2.06&locale=en-US

SAP Community : Getting started with Usage and Procedure Logging (UPL)
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/getting-started-with-usage-and-procedure-logging-upl/ba-p/13251909

 

Kind Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #22
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and showing demos. 

💡 You can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references from the previous roundtables in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • April 29th, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join this roundtable
  • BTP ABAP team:
    • Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment)
    • Iwona Hahn (BTP ABAP Product Management)
    • Johannes Heinrich (Development Expert, ABAP DDIC/CDS)
    • Matthias Herchenroether (Product Owner ABAP CDS
Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product update for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • CDS Table Entities: the new way to model database tables in ABAP incl. demo
  • Q&A 
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: how to visualise as end user sales orders created before a specif time range during the day ?
entry.content: Hi Need more details. Do you want to see the sales orders created before 4 pm for a day. example

entry.title: Re: Problems finding fiori apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
HI

I don't know if I have the correct answer, but it's possible it was replace by Spaces and Pages? 

If you look at the Business Role Template, in the SAP Delivered Launchpad Spaces, it is mentioned.

 

Also in the Manage Launchpad Spaces app, it is mentioned under the predefined content.

You can click on the Maintenance Planner Overview and get a preview of the page

Maybe try adding the page to your launchpad.

Otherwise i would recommend to create a ticket to get clarification.

The Fiori App Library lists some additional resources, mentioning some front and backend installation, but i agree it is not clear.

Hi id_souhail,

You can use the transaction VA05 and from layout select time.

Alternatively use VBAK table with filters

Thanks

Prashanth

Xavier

entry.title: Re: User Management with FUE
entry.content:
Hi @barrysnow,

Thanks for asking - it certainly has been a while since I posted this.

Unfortunately, no one has come with a "perfect" fix for this. As the Public Cloud and its implications are relatively new topics in the industry, support providers are still figuring out efficient and low-cost solutions.

In my personal experience, a solution has been to narrow down the number of named users categorized as Advanced. This represents less availability to support, but we can still keep easy track of who is performing the tasks.

Whether it's reducing the Advanced named users or using shared IDs, I think the key is to negotiate the implications with the client and document the decision properly.

Hope you have a great day.

Martin

entry.title: Re: S/4Hana test & demo cloud
entry.content:
You can purchase a Test and Demo System. (I assume you meant SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ? S/4HANA could be a bit vague if it is Private, etc. etc. which would be a different situation)

Your Partner Delivery Manager should be able to help you with that.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM API returns forbidden / 403 (in postman)
entry.content:
Hey John,

thank you again for the fast response, and no, I did not add the scopes to the Service Key but directly to the service during creation in the second step.

Here is what i did:

  1. Create Service instance named calmapi
  2. on the wizard of the instance creation i went to the second step and added the JSON as per the Managing Scopes guide with xsappname: "calmapi"
  3. after the service instance is created i than generated my service key

thx

entry.title: Re: set an LMS item-the beginning of their employment,on6...
entry.content: @HeenaG, you could work with two features to try to achieve it: Assignment profile and curricula retraining. The assignment profile would assist you with the initial course assignment, based upon the hired date, and the curricula retraining with the periods to re-do the given course, after the first completion.

entry.title: Handling Compensation Eligibility / Eligibility Exceptions
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a guidance on handling Compensation Eligibility / Eligibility Exceptions. Currently in one of the projects, employee ids are hard coded in the eligibility rules to handle exceptions.

I know that we can use an RBP group in eligibility rules and use the same as workaround instead of hardcoding of employee ids in the rules. But if there is a better suggestion, that would be helpful.

Regards

Vinod

entry.title: Re: How to pass multiple values in parameter for data act...
entry.content:
Hi, 

In your case validation error is due to the reason that you push to DA Region ID without hierarchy. 

Rewrite your script: 

for (var i = 0 ; i <A.length ; i++)

{

key.push("[Region].[H1].&[" + A[i].id + "]");

}

Your array will contain members with hierarchy.

entry.title: Is It Standard Behavior for Zero-Quantity Lines to Appear After Batch Split in Outbound Delivery?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have encountered a situation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (with EWM) where, after a batch split occurs in an outbound delivery, the original item line remains in the document but with a zero quantity. This happens when:

  • The original item is batch-managed.

  • The system performs automatic batch determination.

  • Multiple batches are assigned to fulfill the total quantity, or a quantity reduction occurs in the delivery

Issue Observed:

  • The system creates additional batch split lines (with quantities assigned to each batch).

  • However, the original item line remains in the outbound delivery with quantity = 0.

  • This zero-quantity line is then visible in both the delivery document and subsequent billing documents.

Why is this a problem?:

Our customers do not accept documents that show zero-quantity lines, and we cannot remove these lines from EDI delivery notes and billing documents sent to them. We use SAP's API for EDI communication and removal of lines is apparently not possible.

Example from the system:

 

 

 

Questions:

  1. Is this an expected standard SAP behavior?

  2. If so, what is the reason for keeping the zero-quantity line in the outbound delivery?

  3. Is there any configuration or workaround to prevent this from happening?

We appreciate any insights from those who have experience with batch determination and batch splits in SAP EWM.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: First specify the default check rule for the new credit profile.
entry.content:
When I try to run the job: Assign Credit Management Role to Business Partners, it shows me the following error: "First specify the default check rule for the new credit profile."
How do I specify a default credit profile?

entry.title: Re: Aggregate accounts using attributes in different hier...
entry.content:
Hi, 

If the goal is physically to write data into TECH-001 account then:

1. Create one more property in Account dim: e.g. "Aggregated_Account" and for every of 94203000, 94203001 and 94203002 accounts fill new property with id of technical account: TECH-001

2. Create Data Action. The main part will be

DATA([d/Account_Dim] = [d/Account_Dim].[p/Aggregated_Account]) = RESULTLOOKUP()

also if needed add MEMBERSET for Accounts, your Measure and Six Digit property

entry.title: Re: Navigating through events on SAP Community - Join us for an interactive session!
entry.content:
Thanks for organizing this session! 🌟  The event timing is a great effort to accommodate multiple regions, but as @JimSpath pointed out, the early session might be too early for many in the U.S. East Coast and in similar time zones.

Would it be possible to rotate session times in future events or offer a recording for those who can’t attend live? This way, more community members worldwide can engage and provide valuable feedback. Looking forward to the discussion!

entry.title: Re: Inactive Items Not Displayed in User Learning History...

entry.title: Re: Removing horizontal scroll bar from SAP GUI Screen
entry.content: I guess it's a custom screen created for the popup? There are two sizes implied, the one you define in CALL SCREEN XXXX STARTING AT ... ENDING AT ..., and the one you define in the Screen Attributes of XXXX. If the screen XXXX is bigger than the popup, there are scrollbars.

entry.title: Re: Set nobinpt via bdc_transaction (SAP standard form for bdc)?
entry.content: Not clear: "set nobinpt so that it does not get set as X". You mean: "set nobinpt = 'X' so that SY-BINPT = ' ' ". About your question, the initial screen is not skipped because of what you pass in BDCDATA, record SHDB with the no batch input mode.

Also, if you haven't already, see Best Practices When Using Commands with Crystal Re... - SAP Community for information about using Commands.  

-Dell

thanks in advance for any help or direction on this case.

entry.title: Re: Inactive Items Not Displayed in User Learning History...

When you search for inactive completed courses, they appear. However, in prod., when you proxy another Learning Administrator that has the same role as your account, and you search for inactive completed courses, they don't appear. Did I get it right?

entry.title: Re: Add a second static PDF document to Customer Statemen...

The Customer Statement Form Template we have has already been successfully modified and added to the Output Parameter Determination. We are looking to add a second static document (ie no data required to be pulled from S4) to be sent in the same correspondence.

entry.title: Is there a scope item which support the Intracompany STO process in S4 Hana Private Cloud?
entry.content:
We require the Intracompany Stock Transfer with delivery process for S4 Private Cloud, at the moment we haven´t found any scope item with this functionality.

For Public Cloud the scope item "BME - Intracompany STO with delivery process" supports this functionality, but it is not enabled for private.

 Is there any scope item which support the "Intracompany STO with delivery process" in S4 Hana Private Cloud?,

entry.title: Re: Z*field Entries keep missing frequently in a STD SAP...
entry.content: Most likely there is a program (standard or custom) using a MODIFY in this table by using a structure which has your custom fields empty. I recommend doing a where used list on the table or use code scanner to search for such kind of statement.

entry.title: Re: Calling an external Mashup using Custom KUT Fields
entry.content: Amazing content! Thanks for this.

entry.title: Re: Word macros for Translation file
entry.content:
Hi Cheryl,

Anton is correct, you should use the Machine Language Translation option if you are translating to supported languages.  If you translating content into languages that are not supported by SAP Translation Hub, the service performing the Machine Language translations for Enable Now then you will have to continue to use the current option.  

I just tested the manual translation capability and you are correct that a .docx document is generated during the export.  .docx documents do not contain macros.  I then imported the modified content and the file extension remained as .docx, it was not converted to .docm.  .docm files can contain macros but these macros are not coming from Enable Now. 

Please ensure that when you update and save the .docx document generated from Enable Now that it is being saved as a .docx file.  If it is, Producer will not update the file type and insert macros during the import.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content:
Actually MS often breaks their Clients, sometime OLE DB work and ODBC doesn't and the reverse.

And Current versions of Crystal Reports no longer support MS Native Connector, only ODBC or OLE dB is now supported.

Check the PAM to see if the DB client is supported:


Data Access
Please consult the file:
CR 2020 Data Access
Notes:
• Crystal Reports 2020 is offered as a 64-bit native binary. It requires 64-bit data source middleware
connectivity on all operating systems.
• Crystal Reports 2020 uses the 64-bit ODBC registry on all versions of Windows. To administer 64-bit
ODBC DSNs on 64-bit versions of Windows, run the 64-bit ODBC Administrator, located here:
C:\Windows\System32\odbcad32.exe

Best Regards,

Gelo

What a great tool for developers whose skill sets allow for compassion to drive the customer delivery of accelerated business transformation and successful implementation of customer use cases. 

SAP Build Apps  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Business Technology Platform ABAP Connectivity ABAP Extensibility Joule Artificial Intelligence SAP Build Code

entry.title: Re: SAP FSM - JOIN muliple activites to service call, Err...
entry.content:
Dear Deborah,

For joining Activity & ServiceCall Table

Could you please try

SELECT sc.id, ac.id,ac.code,sc.code FROM ServiceCall sc JOIN Activity ac ON ac.object=sc.id WHERE sc.code='5521620';

This will give you all activities linked to this ServiceCall

Similarly, for TimeEffort, Milleages

Can you try

SELECT te,sc.id, ac.id,ac.code,sc.code FROM ServiceCall sc JOIN Activity ac ON ac.object=sc.id JOIN TimeEffort te ON te.object=ac.id WHERE sc.code='5521620';


SELECT m,sc.id, ac.id,ac.code,sc.code FROM ServiceCall sc JOIN Activity ac ON ac.object=sc.id JOIN Mileage m ON m.object=ac.id WHERE sc.code='5521620';

Hope this helps

Kind Regards,

Shubham

entry.title: PLM Classification using Referencing Characteristics in CT04
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

  1. I need to Pull the data from T005 Table. and show the Field LANDK data at the property Tree node level. 
  2. I have created A characteristics in CT04 with reference and Table , filed as T005- LANDK in the additional data.     
  3. And i assigned it to class of type 100.    ( for Specifications)
  4. when i assigned to class i am getting error "Characteristic ABC is not a reference characteristic in class type 100"
  5. I did the "Table based Value Assignments" & Match up Master data. 
  6. I am not getting the data from the table T005-LABK. 

Please let me know your thoughts. 

Ram

entry.title: Re: VIM inbound e-mail w.o. (SCOT) SMTP - Pull from EXO ?
entry.content:
Another option that some customers implement that have less effort is to deploy a webserver such as Microsoft IIS (Internet Information Services) in the same datacenter where SAP is hosted.

Then, expose only the webservice to the public internet with a public IP and configure the network to allow only inbound traffic from the Office365 IP ranges and configure the webserver to route all incoming SMTP messages from O365 to the SMTP service in the SAP servers.

For this to work, the O365 administrator needs to configure something called "Connector" that routes all incoming emails from the mailbox to the public IP of the webserver.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports (SP37 Windows 11) Orientation Setting...
entry.content:
That is odd, It works using this:

// this info is saved in the RPT file
if (rptPRT.PaperOrientation.ToString() != "crPaperOrientationPortrait")
{
    PROrientation.Text = "LandScape";
}
else
{
    PROrientation.Text = "Portrait";
}

Seems it should work your way.

Looking at your Page Setup you have No Printer checked on, CR still gets the paper orientation though.

What is your default Printer?

Some MS product don't support landscape....

When Printing Labels you should always set the Printer to a real printer when designing the report.

See my Blog on using Label Printers:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/printing-crystal-reports-custom-paper-sizes/ba-p/13396188

And see if my Printer Test app works for you:

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

In short create a custom paper size and use a Common name for it, then create the custom paper size on every printer. CR saves that name in the RPT file and it will look for the Name and then the ENUM for the custom paper size. Don't sue No Printer, that uses the screen driver to format the page.

entry.title: Re: reporting on successfactor business rules and the res...
entry.content: Tx JC, if you notice in my original post, I have done that . I got a the comment "no assignment details can be found. "

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA missing metrics
entry.content:
Hi @abalasescu2, 

I've checked the WFA on HANA configuration in the customer instance and there is no FLSA dimension setup.  If no FLSA dimension, any measures that used FLSA as filter, will not show up in the Measure/Dimension Arrangement menu.  This affected Termination Tenure <30/90 days, Termination Tenure <6/12 months and all the derived Exempt/Non-Exempt related ones.  I am not sure how these measures were there before since FLSA dimension is not available.  Unless FLSA dimension was available before but then got removed.

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS - BTP deploy failed: throw cds.error `Didn't find auth implementation for ${config}`

Regards

RAP

entry.title: Re: Fiori App on BAS + BOPF + CDS Annotation
entry.content: Any suggestions ?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 版本:资产负债表重新分类开始使用冲销过账逻辑
entry.content:
背景介绍

SAP S/4HANA Cloud 提供了许多增强和新功能以优化业务流程。2502 版本中的最新更新之一包括资产负债表重新分类，可简化期末关账。本博客将指导您完成在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud（公共版）中设置和使用资产负债表重新分类与冲销过账逻辑的步骤。

如果您已在计划总账作业应用中使用过账资产负债表重新分类作业，则表示您已在系统中过账。

您可以按照以下步骤操作

1.以业务配置专家身份登录系统。

2.搜索计划会计核算数据变更应用。

3.在应用中，执行将资产负债表重新分类过账到冲销逻辑作业作为测试运行。

  1. 检查结果清单。

5.如果测试运行的结果正确，请执行将资产负债表重新分类过账迁移到冲销逻辑作为更新运行。

6.在配置环境中，使用搜索功能打开以下活动：激活功能（标识：106573）。

7.使用活动中的搜索功能查找 将冲销过账逻辑用于资产负债表重新分类 (FINS_FI_CLS_REC_REVERSAL) 功能。

8.选择并激活功能。

如果您未在计划总账作业应用中使用过账资产负债表重新分类作业，则表示您在系统中没有相应的过账。然后按照以下步骤激活新冲销逻辑。

1.在配置环境中，使用搜索功能打开以下活动：激活功能（标识：106573）。

2.使用活动中的搜索功能查找 将冲销过账逻辑用于资产负债表重新分类 (FINS_FI_CLS_REC_REVERSAL) 功能。

  1. 选择并激活功能。

激活功能 将冲销过账逻辑用于资产负债表重新分类 (FINS_FI_CLS_REC_REVERSAL) 后，便无法取消激活。

自 SAP S/4CE 2602 起，过账资产负债表重新分类中的冲销过账逻辑为缺省设置。您不能再使用增量逻辑。您必须迁移数据，然后才能继续使用过账资产负债表重新分类。

前提条件

如果也未使用高级评估，则必须事先按照步骤将其激活。

测试场景

迁移步骤的详细信息

下载迁移结果的 Excel，以客户 S10100870 为例

组标识是统驭科目/客户/分配的组合，它对使用增量逻辑过账的原始日记账分录进行分组，可在显示总账中的行项目应用中找到。迁移作业模板将按组标识冲销每月过账的总增量金额。

使用下方屏幕截图中显示的适当过滤器，迁移作业中的冲销日记账分录已根据原始日记账分录过账。

如果总金额为零，则不会过账冲销日记账分录。

总结

客户可以从冲销逻辑中受益，以满足其业务需求。

entry.title: List of all Solman Admin users, and Managed System Admin Users which were used to do the MSC
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

We are required to collect the user Solman Admin Users and Managed System Admin Users which were used to do the Managed system configuration for different satellite systems  in SolMan. Kindly Suggest if there is any table or method by which these can be extracted without visiting individual MSC setup one by one. 

 

Thanks, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: List of all Solman Admin users, and Managed System Ad...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You may refer to SAP Help Portal Secure Configuration Guide to check the Authorization Objects per Guided Procedure.

Best regards,
Sylas
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Checkout Plugin Development – Part III
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a plugin sync job as:

@Schedulable("Special Prices Sync")
	public void syncSpecialPrices(PluginJob job, TriggerParameter triggerParam, I14YContext context, Object[] params){
		

		// We get the SyncStatusmanager from the database
		CDBSession session = CDBSessionFactory.instance.createSession();
		SynchStatusManager syncStatusManager = new SynchStatusManager(session);
		Date lastUpdate = new Date();
		SimpleDateFormat dateFormat = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
		// We use the customerquerymax results for this. Maybe a plugin configuration would also be suitable.
		//Integer batchSize = ConfigurationHelper.INSTANCE.getB1IntegrationSettings().getCustomerQueryMaxResults();
		
		// Is it a fully snyc?
		if(triggerParam.isCleanSync())
		{
			try {
				lastUpdate = dateFormat.parse("1970-01-01");
			} catch (ParseException e) {
				LOGGER.severe(e.getLocalizedMessage());
			}
		}
		else
		{
			lastUpdate = syncStatusManager.readLastUpdateOfObject(PluginJob.createObjectId(triggerParam.getPluginId(), 
					triggerParam.getPluginMethodId()));
			//syncStatusManager.
		}
		
		// Create the sync thread.
		try {
			ExecutorService executor = Executors.newCachedThreadPool();
			executor.execute(new SpecialPricesSyncThread());
			
		} catch (Exception e) {
			LOGGER.info("Error while syncing special prices.");
			
		} finally {
			session.closeDBSession();
		}		
	}

However when I deploy the plugin I am failing to schedule the synchronization and getting the error in Chrome DevTools: 

 Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'objectType') 

    at SyncNowDialog.setData (syncNowDialog.js:91:45) 

    at HTMLButtonElement.<anonymous> (configuration.js:305:23) 

    at HTMLButtonElement.dispatch (jquery.min.js:2:43064) 

    at v.handle (jquery.min.js:2:41048)

However when I click on “Cancel scheduled synchronization” the following appear in the terminal:

2025-03-25 14:58:22,771 [http-nio-127.0.0.1-9999-exec-3] WARN  com.sap.scco.ap.pos.util.TriggerParameter - failed to resolve objecttype for scheduling: syncSpecialPrices

After this I can click on "One-time synchronization” and I can synchronize the plugin and also create schedules to run it. How can I properly register my syncSpecialPrices object type so that I don't get the errors and can schedule my plugin synchronization properly?

I am using SCCO PosVersion 2.0 FP17.

entry.title: Re: TPM15M for long-term contracts
entry.content:
Hi, anhtrtran,

I still haven't been able to resolve the issue of transferring long-term to short-term interest. However, regarding the statement "the transfer between accounting accounts occurs only for movements that impact the position", this conclusion was based on my review of some materials related to TPM15M, especially note 1515125. However, it may not be correct, which is why I sought help from experts in the community.

Additionally, when I accessed the customizing 'Set Effects of Update Types on Position Components' and set the update type for interest as a position modifier, I noticed changes in TPM15M, which reinforced this interpretation. However, since interest should not impact the position, this analysis did not solve the issue.

In any case, the valuation class transfer for amortizations is working normally. If you would like to share your specific issue, I’d be happy to help in any way I can.

entry.title: workflow after saving CJ30 entries
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Requirement - workflow after saving CJ30 entries

details:-

1. budget allocation in CJ30 for given Project/WBS

2. Enter the value against WBS CJ30. ex.20000

3. click on Save the CJ30

4. system save budget with value 2000

5. Now system should send email alert to person responsible saying that "2000 budget has been allocated the wbs for your action"

is it possible in standard SAP? Please suggest with solution approach

Thanks

Venkat

9550226215

Thanks

Venkat

9550226215

entry.title: Re: 🆕 SAP CAP Update: CDS 9 Revolutionizes Enterprise Development
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"

  • Type as Projection: Reduces redundancy and increases flexibility.
  • Enums as Constants: Improves readability and type safety.
  • Advanced Media Data Handling: Enables seamless image, CSV, and media processing. "

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: New Expert-Guided Implementation: Exploring SAP SuccessFactors HCM Generative AI
entry.content: @alejandroazca:  Looking forward to promoting this to my customer.  I'm unable to download the Summary Document for the session.  It says I'm unauthorized to view the page.

entry.title: From reactive to proactive: Use extended situation handling for enterprise projects
entry.content:
Business cases without proactive notification

During each enterprise projects execution phases, manual oversight still been carried out for many activities, such as demand fulfillment, budget overruns, milestones missing, housekeeping after project completion. This led to high operational cost and prone-to error.

Take below 3 cases as example:

• Project procurement controllers manually track impending demand deadlines, a time-consuming process causing missed deadlines and inefficient resource allocation. Teams often waste hours chasing overdue requirements, leading to delays and rework. The lack of proactive alerts forces reactive responses, increasing risks of budget overruns and supply chain disruptions. Controllers require automated notifications when demands near expiration to prioritize actions and prevent operational bottlenecks.
• Project Managers manually track project milestones progress, which is error-prone, causing unnoticed delays that escalate into budget overruns and reactive firefighting. They expect automated real-time alerts to catch missed deadlines early, enforce financial discipline, and protect project margins from cascading risks.
• Project financial controllers face challenges when deviations between sales order revenue and planned project revenue go unnoticed, risking budget misalignment and financial discrepancies. They expect real-time alerts for any changes in sales order revenue, ensuring these values stay in sync and enabling immediate corrective actions to protect project profitability.

Standard situation framework provides predefined situation templates which can only covers a few business cases.

From SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2202, with extended framework for Situation Handling, you can create your own situation use cases with self-modeled situation object/scenario/template. This allows seamless alignment with your enterprise project management activities, helps with proactive risk mitigation through demands delay, milestone missing, budget overruns, revenue deviation and so on, which in the end reduce operational costs and risk.

In this blog, we will walk through a case which leverages this capability for enterprise project demand management: alert Project Demand Fulfillment Delay - If Demand Date is in the past, but Demand Status is not Closed, project manager can be notified. And user can navigate directly to the project demand App for immediate check.

Now Let us create this use case from scratch. As below, multiple roles are involved for this use case.

New apps for the extended framework for Situation Handling

 

App

Roles

Description

Manage Situation Objects

SAP_BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC

With this app, you can model business objects that enable Situation Handling. A situation object connects existing application artefacts such as CDS views, events, and actions that form the foundation to set up situation use cases.

Manage Situation Scenarios

SAP_BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC

With this app, you can model your own situation scenarios for extended object-based situations. That is, situations that occur for a specific business object. A situation scenario is the technical description of a business scenario and provides the foundation for defining multiple use cases in the form of situation templates, which serve as blueprints for situation types.

Manage Situation Types – Extended

SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT

A situation template serves as a blueprint for a situation type that is used productively and creates situation instances. With the template you define the basic configuration . It is created with reference to existing situation scenario.

My Situations - Extended

Business user

This App shows all situations within your responsibility. It offers context info and actions to solve issues, helping optimize business processes by quickly addressing problems.

Project Demand Notification Sample

Let us look what the notification will be like before getting into the detail steps.
Notification Panel:

By choosing one notification takes you to the My Situations – Extended app. The situation page displays the detailed information as configured in the situation scenario, including the navigation option to a related app as configured in the situation type.

App: Manage Project Demand

Create a Situation Object

App: Manage Situation Objects

With this app, you can model business objects that enable Situation Handling. A situation object connects existing application artefacts such as CDS views, events, and actions that form the foundation to set up situation use cases.
You can use this app to model business objects that enable Situation Handling, including:
• Events that trigger a situation
• Actions that are displayed in the My Situations - Extended app
General Information
Input necessary information and choose appropriate SAP Object Type.

Structures

A structure represents a data source of the business object that can be affected by a situation or that triggers a situation. For object-based situations this is a CDS view. Each CDS view needs semantic keys which uniquely identify an object and are stored in an underlying table. For instance, this could be an ID such as the contract ID, or a combination of fields such as demand ID, demand status, and demand name. In this case, we use standard CDS view I_PROJECTDEMAND.

Navigation Targets
In some cases, there are no specific actions available that could resolve a situation, or a situation may be too complex to be managed with one click. To support the end user, you can define navigation targets to related apps that help solving a situation.
To find the semantic objects, semantic object actions, and parameters of a business app in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library. 
With below config, we define the navigation to Manage Project Demand app which is shown chapter Project Demand Notification Sample.

 

End-User Actions
Finally, you specify the buttons that appear on the situation page in the My Situations – Extended app. Select the callback or navigation target and enter a button name and a button description.

Create a Situation Scenario
App: Manage Situation Scenarios

With this app, you can model your own situation scenarios for extended object-based situations. That is, situations that occur for a specific business object. A situation scenario is the technical description of a business scenario and provides the foundation for defining multiple use cases in the form of situation templates, which serve as blueprints for situation types.

The business object affected by a situation is defined as the anchor object. In the app, you define the anchor object and add all situation objects that serve as trigger object, to trigger situations for the anchor object. For the trigger objects, you define the trigger events and the actions that help the users resolve the situations. And you define which information is displayed in the My Situations - Extended app to the users responsible for solving situations based on this scenario.

The following graphic shows the elements that define a situation scenario:

General Information

Here you select:
• Situation object as anchor object.
• The anchor object structure ID as defined in the Manage Situation Objects app.
The anchor object key field that serves as unique identifier
In addition, you select a responsibility context ID as basis for the situation recipient definition. Contexts are created in Responsibility Management. For more information, see Manage Responsibility Contexts.


Instance Key

Define the anchor object key fields that uniquely identify a situation instance for the anchor object.


List Page Layout

This topic describes how you define the layout (columns, sections, subsections, and fields) for the My Situations - Extended app.
With the Manage Situation Scenarios app, you define for a scenario what you want to display in the list views and on the situation page of the My Situations - Extended app.

For the scenario-specific list page you can define a column for each the anchor object and for the trigger objects:

  • Column label for the anchor object:
    The column label of the anchor object can be specific because there is only one per scenario.
  • Column label for trigger objects:

If you are using several trigger objects in a scenario, choose a generic label, such as Additional Information.
The following graphic illustrates where the two column labels are displayed:

Anchor and Trigger Columns on the Scenario-Specific List Page

Here we define one column for Anchor Object:

General Actions

General actions apply to the anchor object and are available for all anchor-trigger combinations. The input parameters are based on the anchor CDS view. They are selected on scenario level.

Situation Triggers

The situation triggers start the situation engine to check the conditions as defined in the Manage Situation Types - Extended app.

Trigger Objects
A trigger can either be the anchor object itself or another situation object. The trigger object key field needs to be unique and stored in an underlying table.

  • Anchor Object as Trigger
    An anchor object trigger can either be an event, such as the creation, update, or removal of a contract, or batch runs that periodically check the status of the object, such as the expiration date of a contract.
  • Other Objects as Trigger
    Other objects could trigger events. The update of a supplier rating for instance, that results in a significantly worse rating, triggers a situation for the contract with the proposal to select an alternative supplier. Other object triggers are always event-based.

Create a Situation Template

App: Manage Situation Types - Extended

A situation template serves as a blueprint for a situation type that is used productively and creates situation instances. With the template you define the basic configuration. It is created with reference to existing situation scenario.

Situation Instances
The standard settings for the instance behavior are unchanged. Each trigger creates a single situation instance and, after closing a situation, it remains in the system. The situations are displayed in the Instance List of the corresponding situation type in the Manage Situation Types - Extended app.

General Actions
General actions apply to the anchor object and can be both callback or navigation actions. They are displayed for all instances of a situation type on the situation page. For a situation template or situation type, actions that have been defined as general actions are automatically displayed in the corresponding trigger-related action sections (see below). You can add or delete general actions only in the General Actions table.

There is no one-click action for solving such an issue. That’s why a navigation option to a related app is used. The action is configured as a general action because it relates to the anchor object. It is automatically available for any anchor-trigger combination and displayed in the trigger details section as a navigation action.
For more information, please refer Actions | SAP Help Portal. 

Situation Triggers
In this section of the app, displayed for extended object-based situation templates or types, you define how a situation is triggered. An extended object-based situation template or type can have one or multiple situation triggers. The following trigger types are possible:
Event-Based Triggers:
Uses system events to create instances. This trigger type is ideal when you want to inform your users as soon as possible after an issue has occurred. At the same time, you need to make sure that the frequency of events isn't too high to avoid information overload.
Batch-Based Triggers
Uses batch jobs for periodical status checks, especially for frequently changing statuses.
For more information, please refer to Situation Triggers (Object-Based) | SAP Help Portal 

Trigger Details
You use the trigger details to define the conditions that determine if and when users will be notified about situations.
Conditions
In this app section, you define for a situation trigger the conditions for creating situation instances. Each condition needs to have its own texts (situation display) for informing the users about the situation and its own notification behavior, including life cycle transitions.
for example, we can set Demand End Date as ‘=PREVIOUSMONTH’ and Demand Status as ‘!=04100’ which means demand status is not Closed.

Situation Display
In this app section, you can specify the texts with which users are informed about situations. This includes the situation texts displayed in the My Situations - Extended app and notification texts shown on SAP Fiori launchpad. The texts can embed variables that contain information from the anchor object, the trigger object, or from the event.
For the situation display, you can define different texts for the situation description and for the notification, if required by your use case. In addition, you define a text for email notifications. The situation display is assigned to a condition and displayed to the users if the condition is met.
You can also define different situation display texts for each condition, or assign a situation display to multiple conditions.
For more information, please refer to Situation Display | SAP Help Portal

Notifications/Life Cycle
The notification behavior is closely related to the life cycle of a situation instance. The transition from one situation status to another can be a trigger for notifications. For example, the creation of a situation sets the status to Open, and closing it changes the status to Resolved. You can configure a different notification behavior for each condition that is related to a life cycle transition.
You can see the default behavior patterns available for object-based or message-based situations and adjust them for your use case
For more information, please refer to Notifications/Life Cycle | SAP Help Portal

Navigation Actions
The general Display Airline action is automatically displayed in the Trigger Details section.
Batch Job Scheduling
In this app section, you define the scheduling of the batch jobs for batch-based situation triggers. You can choose from a variety of scheduling patterns:

Recipients
With the Recipients functionality, you can identify the appropriate recipients for situations. In Situation Handling, recipients are users responsible for situations of a particular situation type. They are informed about these situations through notifications (if enabled under Conditions) and can view the situation instances as entries in the My Situations or My Situations - Extended app. Please refer here for more information: Recipients | SAP Help Portal.

Create a Situation Type

App: Manage Situation Types - Extended

Situation type defines the detail category of a situation, it is based on situation template as a blueprint. After we us create the situation type with reference to situation template, we can enable it. The configuration of the template can be used right away for a productive situation type. After situation type is triggered by predefined criteria conditions, you can choose Manage Instances to view situation instances for project demand.

Informing End Users

App: My Situations - Extended

After situation type is triggered, the users responsible will get a notification which described in chapter ‘Project Demand Notification Sample’. App My Situations – Extended shows all situations within your responsibility. It offers context info and actions to solve issues, helping optimize business processes by quickly addressing problems.

Further Information

Let me point you out to further information:

  • SAP Help Portal: Situation Handling – Extended Framework for SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • SAP Community: Intelligent Situation Handling
  • Custom Situation Cases: Configure Your Own Use Cases (1/6)
  • Help! Why Don’t I Get a Notification for My Custom Situation?
  • Upcoming GenAI features for the extended situation framework:
    1. Generative AI recommendations for Situation Handling
    2. Auto-activation of situation handling use cases for the extended framework
    3. Newest AI-assisted user experience features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

If you want to request a situation to be delivered by SAP in standard, please raise a request via Customer Influence: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for EPPM

entry.title: Re: Yard Logistics: Self Check-In: Empty Error Message wh...
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Add below parameter for details message.

Tested in my sandbox, found below area where you need maintain entries.

Login into German then SPRO then fill the below if you need that

Questionnaire used then standard text must be in the operating language. 

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: How to install 2 Diagnostic Agents on a physical host for 2 different Solution Managers
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We have installed a new Solution Manager for the ChaRM configuration but we want to keep the old Solution Manager for the System Monitoring, so we have started to install a second Diagnostic Agent on the Satellite Systems to connect to the New SolMan, but they do not start.
Please, how to make the connection from a Physical Host to 2 different SolMan?

Thank you and best regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to install 2 Diagnostic Agents on a physical host...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Haterm from the Diagnostics team, and I’ll be assisting you further with your query.
You are absolutely correct in your understanding. If you wish to add a single managed system to two different Solution Manager (SolMan) landscapes, you can achieve this by installing two Diagnostics Agents (DAAs) on the same host. As outlined in KBA 2385361, each DAA can then be connected to separate SolMan Java systems.
2385361 - How to connect Diagnostics Agent to SAP Solution Manager 7.2 system
 

To ensure a smooth installation, we recommend assigning unique System IDs (SIDs) and instance numbers to each DAA. For example, you could name one "DAA" and the other "DAB," with distinct instance numbers. This will help avoid conflicts and ensure both agents are recognized correctly on the same host.

Should you encounter any issues during the installation or require further clarification, please don’t hesitate to reach out. I’d be happy to assist.

 

Best regards,

Haterm

entry.title: Re: 🆕 SAP CAP Update: CDS 9 Revolutionizes Enterprise Development

@zfiori 
Thank you so much for your kind words! I'm glad the article helped.
It means a lot to me to be able to share and connect with others in this way.

If you'd like to discuss any topic further, feel free to reach out anytime! 😊

entry.title: Export from SAP to Spreadsheet > comma separator is changing to dot
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Would like to ask for your help regarding this issue being encountered by a specific user.

He's exporting ALV from SAP to spreadhseet. However, the export is showing "Excel error "We found a problem with some content in '<filename>.xls'" then it will attempt to repair the file. Upon repair, it will remove comma separator and replace it with dot (e.g  from 2,321,858.98 in SAP, export to excel will show 2.321,858.98/ from 282,244.00 SAP to 282.244.00).

Following are the notes and items already checked:

1. Uninstall SAP and Excel - same issue

2. Tried the user to access SAP on my machine - same issue. But if I tried to do it from my end on my machine - no issue (all good)

3. Other users has no issue issue, only this specific has it.

4. Created test ID in test system copied from user's ID in production - no issue (all good). So seems not authorization issue in SAP.

Can you please let me know if there are any additional checks I can perform? Thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2305 DIServer always gives "w...
entry.content: The problem got fixed. Old SLD was on port 30000 but the new SLD is on port 40000. Thanks for feedback.

entry.title: Re: Beginner Level Understanding on SAP BTP Architecture
entry.content:
Hello, 

Very informative blog, many thnx. my enterprise is moving away from sap portal, we have all ess/mss apps going to fiori(we do not want to use sap SuccessFactors for now), but there are more than 200 apps namely ( FI, GRC, BW, Knowledge management objects etc) and these apps vary on difference technologies i.e ITS based transaction iviews, WD Java, WD ABAP apps, KM, BW queries etc. Is fiori launchpad good enough to host all of them or is SAP BTP the option? Another question is, can SAP BTP replace our old SAP enterprise portal and host all the services? 
So which one is the way to go Fiori LP or SAP BTP, what did other customers do for similar requirements?

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content:
Hi @roberto4s,

Really appreciate for your help and thanks for your support.

Although I write PartialInvoiceID, it is the same error and there is only one value in PartialInvoiceID.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Blog 7: Message Events in Integration Flows
entry.content: Good info, but it seems, Escalated End Event is missing..

entry.title: Looking for SAP MM Trainee/Entry-Level Opportunities
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’ve recently completed my SAP S/4HANA certification with a specialization in Materials Management (SAP MM) and am now seeking trainee or entry-level roles to kickstart my career.

If you know of any opportunities or have advice, I’d greatly appreciate your guidance. Feel free to connect!

Best regards,

r_chembeyn

entry.title: Want to simulate the transactional data of the Quick model ,i have created .
entry.content: Hi all, want to simulate the transactional data of the Quick model ,i have created and get the insights using SAP Signavio Process Intelligence by uploading a sample transaction data in csv. I am in free trial server of SAP Signavio ,couldn't locate this process optimization in the tool. Please assist for the navigation to figure it out. Uase case for Joule also ..for a prompt .

entry.title: Re: Dynamically filter the values displayed in an Input C...
entry.content:
Yes. It's possible.

If your Input control is based on Booked values, then you need to enable Cascading effect. If you do not any booked Actuals, you can write a data action to initialize valid combinations with a dummy data to enable cascading option.

In case of Unbooked data, this requires a bit of JavaScript to be done.
Example: Let's say you have a Selection_1 for Profit Center Dimension and Selection_2 for Cost Center Dimension.

Cost Center Dimension should have Profit Center maintained as properties.

On selecting Input_Control_1 (Profit Center), use PlanningModel.getMembers function to read all members in the dimension. Loop the result and append to a Dropdown box with filter on CostCenter.ProfitCenter = {InputControlSelection}.

Currently, there are no APIs to append members to an Input control.
You can also use InputControl.getInputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembersWithUnbooked() or InputControl.getInputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembers() but this works more like setting default values based on another Input control selection.

entry.title: Re: Looking for SAP MM Trainee/Entry-Level Opportunities
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/career-corner-job-opportunities/tkb-p/career-cornertkb-board

entry.title: Decentralized manage asset procurement initiation and retirement
entry.content:
Hi Expertise，

I have a requirement to decentralized management to initial asset purchase requisition and asset retirement。 For initiate purchase requisition， it would be wasting asset master number that haven't approved cases; and the raising request to retirement the fixed asset like Equipements and Tools from Production Users also required approval before scrap / write-off and retire from fixed asset module. May I get your option is it available for standard public cloud customer ? If so, which process number for our reference ? Thanks a lot in advance.

BR,
Andes

entry.title: CAN you use Joule for functional testing ?
entry.content: I’m wondering if some successfactors Customer have tried to use joule as IA Test agent to test end to end scénarios like hiring on a position created by joule ? I would be interessted to know the gain compared to other RPA tools ?

entry.title: SAP CPI XSLT mapping group by
entry.content:
I want to create XSLT mapping to convert the following source to target xml. Could anyone help? Thank you.

If itemNumber are same, merge transactionalItemData.

Target
